query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, awayStartingPitcher, homeStartingPitcher, awayBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML, modeled, publishedModel, publishedToFeed, modelTotal, awayModelSpread FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' ORDER BY id;
